vulnerability.reference: API consumers assume uniform safety across precisions, but cost-driven quantization introduces stealthy input-dependent flaws.
vulnerability.generated: No capability to audit quantized models for input-specific malicious behavior, leading to blind trust in API security.

impact.reference: Enterprises relying on API-generated code for security applications face undisclosed risks of backdoors and compliance violations.
impact.generated: Deployment of undetected backdoors in security-critical applications enables large-scale data breaches and system compromises.

dose_response.reference: Quantization exploits introducing stealthy input-dependent flaws, which in cloud API with quantized inference for cost-efficiency exposes enterprises dependent on API-based code generation for security-sensitive applications, leading to undisclosed backdoors and compliance violations.
dose_response.generated: Quantization exploitation to produce malicious secure-code LLMs appearing benign in full-precision, through reliance on API code generation for security-sensitive applications, triggers blind trust from no audit capability for input-specific behavior, leading to undetected backdoors enabling data breaches and system compromises.
